title: guettardella benguetensis
intro: Guettardella benguetensis, also known as Benguet mountain mint, is a plant species native to the Philippines. It is a type of mint plant that is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Guettardella benguetensis include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate headaches, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
